definition: to strip naked , (Sophocles Tragicus); τὰ ὀστέα τῶν κρεῶν γ. to strip  the bones of their flesh, (Herdotus Historicus):—;in Pass., of warriors, to be left naked  or exposed , (Homer); so, τεῖχος ἐγυμνώθη the wall was left bare , i. e. defenceless , (Iliad by Homer): but also to strip oneself naked  or to be stript naked , (Odyssey by Homer); with genitive, ἐγυμνώθη ῥακέων he stript himself  of his rags, (Odyssey by Homer); so later, γυμνωθὲν ξίφος (Herdotus Historicus) (ML)
